calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-24-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-24-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came as reassigment from PJ department to put setlement on the record.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: Marta Vallejo, CSR:Carlito Mandia
Appearances:
Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Heath, also present
William Simpich, Esq. for defendants: Steve Winkler and Zack Cohen Winkler (sued as doe 1)
Mr. Sacramento to file a Doe amendment and subtitute real name.
The Oral settlement was read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a (future) judgment against the defendants for
Restitution and (immediate) possession of the premises of the property located at:
955 Corbett ST. #10, San Francisco
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Security deposit is forfeited.
If the defendant vacates the premises on or before June 16, 2004 by 5:00 PM
Plaintiff waives all back rent, damages and will dismiss the action with prejudice.
Parties waive claims against each other.
Any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration, with 24 hours notice to the defendant and have judgment entered for Possession and money judgment plus fees and costs.
If judgment enter there will be no stays of execution
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2004 Off Calendar
